warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
5 PVC Around the Worlds each way
5 PVC Pass Throughs
10 Band Row Rotate Press
10 World's Greatest Stretch
10m DB Walking Lunge 22.5/15
10 Strict Press
5 PVC Split Jerk

strength.name: Split Jerk
strength.description:
1x1 | *Legs Long
*Push yourself under the bar
*Punch the ceiling as hard as you can | BUILD 6 Sets E3MOM
00:00 5 @ 50%
03:00 5 @ 60%
06:00 3 @ 70%
09:00 2 @ 80%
12:00 1 @ 90%
15:00 1 @ 95%
18:00-28:00 1RM Attempts

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
4 RFT
12/9 Cal Assault Bike
8 HSPU
6 Burpee Box Overs
Scale HSPU to Box or Pike Push Ups
12 min Cap

hypertrophy.reasoning: Shoulders and triceps are fatigued by jerks and HSPUs; back/biceps provide antagonist balance without competing.

siri_text: Monday's workout. Strength: Split Jerk, 1 by 1 at 95 percent. Metcon: Rounds for Time: 12/9 Cal Assault Bike, 8 HSPU, 6 Burpee Box Overs, Scale HSPU to Box or Pike Push Ups. For hypertrophy, focus on back, biceps, glutes.
